description_long: This train features a robust, industrial design with a dark green and black color scheme accented by yellow hazard stripes and metallic details. The body is segmented into several cylindrical compartments, each topped with domed structures and reinforced with riveted panels. The front is equipped with a large, angular cowcatcher and a prominent circular headlight, while the sides display multiple large wheels and intricate piping. The roof includes several raised hatches and vents, suggesting heavy-duty, possibly steam-powered machinery. The rear section is boxier, with grilles and what appear to be exhaust stacks, and the overall build is heavily armored. The train exudes a steampunk or sci-fi aesthetic, with visible gears and a detached circular saw-like component nearby.
description: A heavily armored, industrial train with a dark green and black color scheme, yellow hazard accents, and multiple cylindrical compartments. It features large wheels, domed hatches, and a prominent front cowcatcher, evoking a steampunk or sci-fi style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the train, highlighting the cylindrical compartments, domed hatches, and detailed wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the boxy end section, exhaust stacks, and a detached circular saw-like component to the side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0 but with different lighting and visibility of the piping and grilles.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the angular cowcatcher, large headlight, and hazard-striped details, with the circular saw-like component visible to the left.
